# StadSpear

> An AI-powered operational control tower for the FIFA World Cup 2026 — helping fans, volunteers, and stadium staff navigate venues, manage crowds, and get real-time multilingual assistance.

StadSpear is a GenAI-enabled stadium operations hub. It combines a multilingual AI concierge chat, live telemetry tiles, wayfinding, transit and sustainability guidance, threaded conversation history, and observability dashboards for venue staff.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of StadSpear's capabilities for fans, volunteers, and operations staff during FIFA World Cup 2026.

## Optional

- [Authentication](/auth): Sign-in page for Google and email-based access to the hub and dashboard.
